description: An action that reads an undeclared file or system tool builds locally but fails or returns wrong cached results elsewhere.
body: Failure mode: a rule or genrule reads a header, config, or binary that is not listed as an input, so the action succeeds on a machine where the file happens to exist. Detection signals: the build passes locally but fails on a clean CI agent or remote executor; cache hits return outputs that ignore a changed undeclared file; results differ by machine. Do not rely on files Bazel does not know about. Safer fallback: declare every file and tool the action uses in srcs, deps, or tools, pin the toolchain, and verify on a clean remote build.
